original.citation: Bede's Death Song: West Saxon Version
original.label: Sacred Texts original

label: Bede's Death Song: West Saxon Version
partTitle: Bede's Death Song: West Saxon Version

sections.label: Bede's Death Song: West Saxon Version
sections.original:
For þam nedfere næni wyrþeþ
þances snotera, þonne him þearf sy
to gehicgenne ær his heonengange
hwæt his gaste godes oþþe yfeles
æfter deaþe heonon demed weorþe.

volumeTitle: Bede's Death Song: West Saxon Version
